nasb.text: All the birds of the heavens nested in its boughs, And under its branches all the beasts of the field gave birth, And all great nations lived under its shade.

esv.text: All the birds of the heavens made their nests in its boughs; under its branches all the beasts of the field gave birth to their young, and under its shadow lived all great nations.

cnv.text: 空中的飛鳥都在枝上搭窩； 田野的走獸都在枝條下生產； 所有大國都在它的樹蔭下居住。

ccb.text: 空中的飞鸟都在它的枝头上搭窝， 田间的野兽都在它的树荫下生产， 所有的大国都住在它的荫下。
